title: Bunny mask
description: Simple resource pack that replace carved pumpkin model with typical mask from skins.
body:
**I decided to make a mask that you could see on a lot of skins in minecraft.**

This was originally done as a joke for a friend, but I decided to post it here XD

![mask on a player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9ad8904e028038aecb970fb60c0dcf5db036576.png)
